profile.belief: Data made audible and visible so neighborhoods can name and resist the forces reshaping their blocks.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep commitment to empower communities, transforming complex data into tangible experiences that foster awareness and resilience.
